title: Command Search Cockpit
concept: A responsive tabbed operations workspace where command search is the discovery layer and persistent panels show route-specific forms, consequences, progress, and mutations to the live Playground shell.
focus: responsive tabbed console with mobile bottom navigation
flows: Search for a command, choose a grouped result, complete a route-specific form, run progress, and mutate the active Playground shell title, path, preview, storage badge, or transfer history
Select and edit a file in Site Manager, produce a dirty state, save it, clear the dirty badge, and write an event into Logs and activity history
Download database.sqlite from the SQLite-backed database with progress, final download state, selected object update, and log record
Save the current temporary Playground in browser storage or to a local directory with distinct destination consequences, progress, saved row insertion, and reset or reload behavior
Manage saved and unsaved Playgrounds with open/manage, rename, delete confirmation, deletion progress, row removal, and active fallback
Run replacement flows for Blueprint URL and ZIP import with validation, confirmation copy, progress, preview mutation, and activity history
Use Site Manager tabs for settings, files, Blueprint, database, logs, Export to GitHub, Download as zip, and database download while the live shell remains visible
featureCoverage: Vanilla WordPress start route
WordPress PR preview route with PR number or URL
Gutenberg PR or branch preview route
GitHub import with account connection and token persistence caveat
Blueprint URL runner with validation and replacement result
Import .zip with native chooser model and replacement warning
Blueprint gallery categories and search with representative subset of 43 labeled honestly
Featured Blueprint shortcuts and selected Blueprint detail
Save in this browser with file-copy progress and browser-backed slug
Save to a local directory with folder picker permission and reconnect consequence
Saved, unsaved, browser, local-directory, and imported Playground states
Saved management open/manage, rename, delete confirmation, delete cancel, delete progress, and final row removal
Current shell path input, refresh, Homepage, WP Admin, temporary/saved state, Save, and reset/reload consequences
Site Manager settings, Files, Blueprint, Database, Logs, Export to GitHub, and Download as zip
Files create file, create folder, upload, browse files, selected file editor, dirty state, save progress, and save result
Blueprint editor, Blueprint URL, copy link, download bundle, run, validation, and result state
SQLite database driver, database path, size, database.sqlite download, Adminer, and phpMyAdmin
Playground, WordPress, and PHP logs with event records
GitHub import and GitHub export portability
ZIP import and ZIP download portability
Database download and Blueprint bundle portability actions
Mobile bottom navigation exposing command, Site Manager, saved Playgrounds, Blueprints, and Transfers without horizontal overflow
